name: jdy_get_flow_logs
description_zh: 查询流程实例的审批日志
description: Query workflow instance logs. Currently supports returning logs with approval comments (type='comment'). Returns logs[] with flow_id, flow_name, create_action, create_time, finish_action, finish_time, comment (string), signature{url} (optional, 15-day valid), attachments[]{name,size,mime,url}, operator{username,name,departments,type,status}. Rate limit: 30/s.

types.description: 返回的日志类型，目前仅支持["comment"]（审批意见）

skip.description: 跳过的条数（分页用），默认0
